response.justification: Maria has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong exposure to TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, aligning well with the core stack. Her AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source contributions demonstrate initiative and depth. However, her resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin/Java — key required technologies — and her German proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise team.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Strong AI-agent and agentic workflow exposure, rare and valuable for this role
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated architecture and tooling skills
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest — core required technologies
Kotlin/Java experience not clearly demonstrated despite being a secondary stack requirement
Basic German proficiency may limit effective collaboration in a local enterprise environment
